title: NOT_FOUND_COLUMN_IN_BLOCK with `exclude_materialize_skip_indexes_on_insert`
description:
### Describe the bug
Not sure if a real issue or not. Referencing `size0` from a Nested subcolumn at an index definition is making a mutation stuck in an infinite loop later.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Nested(c1 Int), INDEX i0 `c0.c1.size0` TYPE set(1)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SET exclude_materialize_skip_indexes_on_insert = 'i0';
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (`c0.c1`) SELECT [1] FROM numbers(1);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (`c0.c1`) SELECT [1] FROM numbers(1);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (`c0.c1`) SELECT [1] FROM numbers(1);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (`c0.c1`) SELECT [1] FROM numbers(1);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (`c0.c1`) SELECT [1] FROM numbers(1);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (`c0.c1`) SELECT [];
DELETE FROM t0 WHERE TRUE; --mutation stuck on the background
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> MergeTreeBackgroundExecutor: Exception while executing background task {db5acb59-bf1e-45de-bf12-1c11f0e563f9::all_1_5_1}: Code: 10. DB::Exception: Not found column c0.c1.size0: in block c0.c1 Array(Int32) Array(size = 0, UInt64(size = 0), Int32(size = 0)). (NOT_FOUND_COLUMN_IN_BLOCK), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x000000002770a8b2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:128: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x0000000014a23c69
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d31930e

4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<String const&>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String const&>::type>, String const&) @ 0x000000000e59f2f6
5. src/Interpreters/ActionsDAG.cpp:1028: DB::ActionsDAG::evaluatePartialResult(std::unordered_map<DB::ActionsDAG::Node const*, DB::ColumnWithTypeAndName, std::hash<DB::ActionsDAG::Node const*>, std::equal_to<DB::ActionsDAG::Node const*>, std::allocator<std::pair<DB::ActionsDAG::Node const* const, DB::ColumnWithTypeAndName>>>&, std::vector<DB::ActionsDAG::Node const*, std::allocator<DB::ActionsDAG::Node const*>> const&, unsigned long, bool, bool) @ 0x000000001ae81e6c
6. src/Interpreters/ActionsDAG.cpp:932: DB::ActionsDAG::updateHeader(DB::Block const&) const @ 0x000000001ae803d2
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 NESTED (c1 INT, c2 FLOAT));
DELETE FROM t1 WHERE c0.c1[1] IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Referencing size0 from a Nested subcolumn in index definition
